description_long: This hot-air balloon features a large, rounded envelope with a segmented surface, predominantly colored in light green on the upper half and white on the lower half, separated by a bold blue horizontal stripe. The envelope displays a logo and text reading 'Zell am See Kaprun' on one side, indicating a promotional or branded design. The top of the balloon has a small, circular black vent. A small, rectangular basket is suspended beneath the envelope, attached by visible cables and a supporting burner frame. The basket appears to be made of wicker or a similar material, with metallic structural elements. The overall design is clean and modern, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and clear branding.
description: A large, green and white hot-air balloon with a blue stripe, branded with 'Zell am See Kaprun' and a small basket suspended below by cables and a burner frame.
description_view_0: The balloon is seen from the side opposite the logo, showing the green and white envelope with a blue stripe and the basket directly below.
description_view_1: This view highlights the balloon's smooth, segmented surface and the basket, with no visible logo or text.
description_view_2: The logo 'Zell am See Kaprun' is clearly visible on the envelope, along with the blue stripe and the basket below.
description_view_3: The logo and text are prominent, and the suspension cables and burner frame are more visible above the basket.
attribute_envelope_pattern: The envelope features a two-tone pattern with a light green upper section and a white lower section, separated by a bold blue horizontal stripe. One side displays a 'Zell am See Kaprun' logo and text in blue and green.
